summary: Addressed prior-review warnings on the SPEC.md section gate. Relaxed the heading regex from `^##\s+Name\s*$` to `^#{2,}\s+Name\b` so annotated headings (`## Goal:`, `### Goal`, `## Goal — note`) match while `## Goalposts` does not. Added negative assertions to the partial-spec test confirming present sections (Goal, Requirements) are NOT listed as missing, guarding against inverted-filter regressions. Full test suite (583 tests) passes.
